title: lycium chinense subf. lanceolatum
intro: Lycium chinense subf. lanceolatum, also known as Chinese boxthorn or wolfberry, is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. It has been associated with several health benefits, including improved vision, enhanced immune function, and reduced risk of age-related diseases such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
